rationale: Educ. Code §11.301 governs continuation of school districts under former chapters. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: Sec. 11.301. APPLICATION OF FORMER LAW. (a) A school district or county system operating under former Chapter 17, 18, 22, 25, 26, 27, or 28 on May 1, 1995, may continue to operate under the applicable chapter as that chapter existed on that date and under state law generally applicable to school districts that does not conflict with that chapter.
_note: Rule text concerns former-law continuation for school districts; no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
